video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. prop (mug_red_v1): state: cracking, visually consistent. 门把手缓慢转动, 红杯突然裂开一道细缝. Narration: "门把手缓慢转动，红杯突然裂开一道细缝。". 林澈 says: "别进来。". Camera motion: extreme close-up, ultra shallow depth of field, slow micro-movement. Extreme close-up of a red mug developing a thin crack, tension, shallow depth of field, ominous lighting. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. All props match reference images exactly. Prop must_keep: shape, color, size, material unchanged.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
video_prompt_keywords: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, red fridge, wooden table, rainy window, dim warm lamp + blue moonlight, mug_red_v1, 门把手缓慢转动, 红杯突然裂开一道细缝, 林澈 says: "别进来。", Extreme close-up of a red mug developing a thin crack, tension, shallow depth of field, ominous lighting

negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, blurry, overexposed, intact mug, multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration, mouth mismatch, silent face, frozen expression, unnatural dubbing, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
camera_motion: extreme close-up, ultra shallow depth of field, slow micro-movement

workflow.tool_instructions: No keyframes found yet. Generate keyframe images first using build-image-prompts, save them to S024/keyframes, then re-run this compiler for img2vid conditioning. Text-to-video is still possible with just 'video_prompt'.
